global_lighting: Strictly from Top-Left corner at a 45-degree angle. Volumetric lighting must adhere to this global direction regardless of local style.
background_rules: All generated isolated objects must sit on a pure #FFFFFF white or solid neutral gray background to easily key out.

dimension_rules.Icons: Must occupy exactly 80% of the canvas framing, perfectly centered
dimension_rules.Characters: Full-body visibility, grounded at the bottom 10% of the canvas
